final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for the automotive brand Changan, announcing the upcoming launch.

Style/medium: clean corporate presentation design, modern minimalist layout with cinematic automotive photography backdrop
Composition: wide 16:9 slide format, title positioned in upper-left third with generous breathing room, subtle gradient overlay for text legibility
Subject: premium automotive product launch announcement, elegant Chinese typography hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: ethereal atmospheric automotive environment — misty mountain road at golden hour or abstract light trails suggesting speed and innovation, translucent layered depth
Lighting/mood: soft diffused backlighting with lens flare accents, inspiring and forward-looking mood, premium brand feel
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as base, warm amber/gold accents suggesting sunrise/dawn, clean white for primary text
Text (verbatim): "长安起源Q06将于9月上市"
Constraints: must maintain high contrast for projection readability; title must dominate; no clutter in lower third (reserved for speaker notes area)
Avoid: generic stock car photos; overcrowded layouts; neon colors; clip art icons; watermarks; busy patterns that fight with text
